cases.prompt: We just learned that plugin-shipped agents can't include hooks — capture that lesson in the knowledge base.
Record the decision to keep knowledge-base storage behind a port (files now, DB later) as a knowledge entry.
Remind me to call the dentist tomorrow at 3pm.
cases.note: confusability negative — 'remind/remember' vocabulary but a personal reminder, not a durable engineering lesson; must NOT fire curating-knowledge
